acris_analysis_2021

Jennah Gosciak

December 13, 2021

  • Load deed data from Acris

Load deed data from Acris

tbl(con, "acris_document_control_codes") %>% 
  filter(class_code_description == 'DEEDS AND OTHER CONVEYANCES')
## # Source:   lazy query [?? x 7]
## # Database: postgres
## #   [furmandata@fcdata.c7h93yqbqnvu.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com:5432/fcdata]
##    record_type doc_type doc_type_description      class_code_descr~ party_1_type
##    <chr>       <chr>    <chr>                     <chr>             <chr>       
##  1 D           ASTU     UNIT ASSIGNMENT           DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
##  2 D           CNTR     CONTRACT OF SALE          DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
##  3 D           CODP     CONDEMNATION PROCEEDINGS  DEEDS AND OTHER ~ PARTY 1     
##  4 D           DCTO     COURT ORDER ADVERSE POSS. DEEDS AND OTHER ~ PARTY 1     
##  5 D           DEED     DEED                      DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
##  6 D           EASE     EASEMENT                  DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
##  7 D           IDED     IN REM DEED               DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
##  8 D           LEAS     LEASE                     DEEDS AND OTHER ~ LESSOR/LAND~
##  9 D           LTPA     LETTERS  PATENT           DEEDS AND OTHER ~ GRANTOR/SEL~
## 10 D           SUBL     SUBORDINATION OF LEASE    DEEDS AND OTHER ~ PARTY 1     
## # ... with more rows, and 2 more variables: party_2_type <chr>,
## #   party_3_type <chr>
## Load acris data, deed records
nyu_acris <- dbGetQuery(con, paste0("SELECT p.*, m.*, l.property_type,
                  l.street_number, l.street_name, l.aptno, l.bbl FROM acris_parties as p
                  INNER JOIN acris_master as m on (p.document_id = m.document_id)
                  LEFT JOIN acris_document_control_codes as d on (m.doc_type = d.doc_type)
                  LEFT JOIN acris_legals as l on (p.document_id = l.document_id)
                  WHERE p.name ~* '^(NYU)$|(\\sNYU,?\\s)|(NEW YORK UNIV.+)|^(NYU,?\\s)'
                  AND p.name NOT IN ('NYU, SOON KEAT',
                                  'OK NYU PARK, AS ADMINISTRATOR OF ESTATE',
                                  'YOON, SOOK NYU CHUNG')"))
nyu_acris
##           document_id record_type party_type

nyu_acris_filt <- nyu_acris %>%
  filter(doc_type != "EASE") %>% 
  arrange(desc(doc_date)) %>% 
  select(c("doc_date","bbl"), everything()) %>% 
  mutate(apt = case_when(!is.na(aptno) ~ 1,
                         TRUE ~ 0)) %>% 
  filter(name != "KEAT NYU, SOON")

nyu_acris %>%
  tablist_qc(name)

nyu_acris %>%
  tablist_qc(party_type)
## 
## ----------------------------
##  party_type   _freq   _perc 
## ------------ ------- -------
##      1        5368    63.6  
## 
##      2        3065    36.3  
## 
##      3          5      0.1  
## ----------------------------
nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  mutate(doc_type = str_trim(doc_type)) %>% 
  select(c("doc_type", "document_id")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  group_by(doc_type) %>% 
  summarize(count = n()) %>% 
  filter(count > 0) %>% 
  arrange(-count)
## # A tibble: 55 x 2
##    doc_type count
##    <chr>    <int>
##  1 DEED       347
##  2 MTGE       290
##  3 INIT       245
##  4 INIC       229
##  5 AGMT       225
##  6 TERM       108
##  7 SAT        107
##  8 PAT         98
##  9 ASST        82
## 10 SUBM        71
## # ... with 45 more rows
nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  saveRDS(path(out, "nyu_acris.RDS"))

Number of documents over time

nyu_acris_filt  <- readRDS(path(out, "nyu_acris.RDS"))

nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  filter(!is.na(doc_date)) %>% 
  select(c("document_id", "doc_date")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  group_by(doc_date) %>% 
  mutate(count = n()) %>% 
  arrange(-count)
## # A tibble: 1,097 x 3
## # Groups:   doc_date [664]
##    document_id      doc_date   count
##    <chr>            <date>     <int>
##  1 2007062801488001 2007-06-20    27
##  2 2007070200138001 2007-06-20    27
##  3 2007070200138002 2007-06-20    27
##  4 2007070200187001 2007-06-20    27
##  5 2007070200187002 2007-06-20    27
##  6 2007070200252001 2007-06-20    27
##  7 2007070200252002 2007-06-20    27
##  8 2007070200308001 2007-06-20    27
##  9 2007070200308002 2007-06-20    27
## 10 2007070200369002 2007-06-20    27
## # ... with 1,087 more rows
# create summary table
nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  filter(doc_type == "DEED") %>% 
  verify(party_type %in% c(1, 2)) %>% 
  pivot_longer("party_type", names_to = "party", values_to = "party_value") %>% 
  mutate(sale_type = if_else(party_value == 2, "Buying",
                             "Selling")) %>% 
  select(c("document_id", "doc_date", "sale_type")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  mutate(doc_year = as.numeric(format(doc_date, "%Y"))) %>% 
  group_by(doc_year, sale_type) %>% 
  summarize(count = n()) %>% 
  arrange(-count)
## # A tibble: 68 x 3
## # Groups:   doc_year [40]
##    doc_year sale_type count
##       <dbl> <chr>     <int>
##  1     2007 Buying       60
##  2       NA Buying       38
##  3       NA Selling      32
##  4     2012 Selling      22
##  5     2008 Selling      16
##  6     2007 Selling      11
##  7     2000 Buying        8
##  8     2010 Buying        8
##  9     2001 Buying        7
## 10     2012 Buying        7
## # ... with 58 more rows
# number of deeds, split by selling vs. buying
nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  filter(doc_type == "DEED") %>% 
  verify(party_type %in% c(1, 2)) %>% 
  pivot_longer("party_type", names_to = "party", values_to = "party_value") %>% 
  mutate(sale_type = if_else(party_value == 2, "Buying",
                             "Selling")) %>% 
  rowwise() %>% 
  mutate(doc_date_mod = min(doc_date, recorded_filed, modified_date, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(c("document_id", "doc_date_mod", "sale_type")) %>% 
  verify(!is.na(doc_date_mod)) %>% 
  unique() %>%  
  mutate(doc_year = as.numeric(format(doc_date_mod, "%Y"))) %>% 
  group_by(doc_year, sale_type) %>% 
  summarize(count = n()) %>% 
  ggplot() +
  geom_line(aes(doc_year, count, color = sale_type)) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,75)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1960, 2021),
                  breaks = seq(1960, 2021, 10)) +
  labs(y = "Number of documents",
       x = "Year") +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors[1:2])

ggsave(path(fig_path, "sale_property.pdf"))

nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  filter(doc_type == "DEED") %>% 
  verify(party_type %in% c(1, 2)) %>% 
  mutate(doc_year = as.numeric(format(doc_date, "%Y"))) %>%
  filter(doc_year == 2007) %>% 
  select(c("street_number", "street_name", "zip", "bbl")) %>% 
  unique()

nyu_acris_filt %>% 
  filter(doc_type == "DEED") %>% 
  verify(party_type %in% c(1, 2)) %>% 
  mutate(doc_year = as.numeric(format(doc_date, "%Y"))) %>%
  filter(doc_year == 1984) %>% 
  select(c("street_number", "street_name", "zip", "bbl")) %>% 
  unique()

  filter(doc_type == "DEED") %>% 
  verify(party_type %in% c(1, 2)) %>% 
  filter(is.na(doc_date))

## 126   0
copy_to(con, nyu_acris_filt,
  name = "nyu_acris_filt", overwrite = T,
  temporary = T
)

## attempt to get spatial info
nyu_acris_geo <- st_read(con, query = "SELECT a.*, r.bbl_unit,
                                          m21.geom_poly as geom1,
                                          m2.geom_poly as geom2 FROM nyu_acris_filt as a
                                          LEFT JOIN rpad_condo_xwalk as r on (a.bbl = r.bbl_unit)
                        LEFT JOIN mappluto_21v3 as m21 on (coalesce(a.bbl, r.bbl_unit) = m21.bbl)
                        LEFT JOIN mappluto_02b as m2 on (coalesce(a.bbl, r.bbl_unit) = m2.bbl)")

nyu_acris_geo %>% 
  select(c("bbl")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  filter(!st_is_empty(geom1)) %>% 
  nrow()
## [1] 602
nyu_acris_geo %>% 
  st_set_geometry("geom2") %>% 
  select(c("bbl")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  filter(!st_is_empty(geom2)) %>% 
  nrow()
## [1] 644
nyu_acris_geo %>% 
  st_set_geometry("geom2") %>% 
  filter(st_is_empty(geom2))
